MINI MINUTES:
Line 9

Judge Pro Tem: Joshua Klipp; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D501/502B)

Appearances:
Plaintiff is not present.
Attorney Paul Arshawsky of Zanghi Torres Arshawsky (415-977-0444), counsel for the plaintiff is present.

Defendants are not present.

Judge Pro Tem Klipp and plaintiff counsel Mr. Arshawsky, litigants and counsel confer in Room 502B. The case is in settlement nogotiations and partially settled out of court. Plaintiff counsel requests and Judge Pro Tem Klipp grants a one-week trial continuance for settlement protective date. The trial date of NOV-24-2014 is continued to December 1, 2014 at 9:00 AM in Dept. 501 for settlement protective date.
